title: Do an update pass on rootless.md to bring it up to date
body:
I couldn't make PRs for a bit, so I was looking for a trivial change to push to see what was going on. Ended up as a bit more than a trivial change, though. And I can push again, so that's nice.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

<!--
Write `None` if there are no user-facing changes, otherwise enter your release note below.
Include "action required" if users need to take action when upgrading.
-->

```release-note
NONE
```

comments.body: LGTM with two questions about paragraphs which are removed completely in a new version.
